news.title: Michigan steps up work to persuade young men to go to college, get skills training
news.summary_en: Michigan is among the top states where young men’s college enrollment has plummeted.
news.author: Kim Kozlowski

news.title: Detroit schools make gains in reading and math: 4 strategies that work
news.summary_en: A new study singles out Detroit as one of the districts nationally that is ‘accelerating recovery.’ How the schools did it — and what more needs to be done
news.author: Lily Altavena, Chalkbeat

news.title: Money woes close a small Michigan college. It’s not alone
news.summary_en: Siena Heights University in Adrian is closing for good after graduating its final class. It’s among a wave of closures for small, private, faith-based colleges regionally and in Michigan.
news.author: Janelle D. James
